content:
# Implementation

## Change Summary

Removed the `AgentExecutionService::invoke` overwrite of `envelope.metadata.backend_used` and `model_used`, so artifact persistence continues to serialize the adapter-reported backend/model metadata already consumed by the workflow persistence call sites. Added a focused async regression test in `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs` that uses a divergent adapter to assert the service preserves adapter-reported backend/model values through invocation completion.

## Steps

0. [Completed] Confirmed the source-of-truth mismatch: workflow artifact producers already read `InvocationEnvelope.metadata`, but `AgentExecutionService::invoke` was rewriting `backend_used` and `model_used` to the resolved target before persistence.
1. [Completed] Removed the metadata overwrite in `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs` so adapter-reported backend/model metadata survives to artifact persistence.
2. [Completed] Added a service-level regression test covering divergent adapter metadata and verified the resulting diff is isolated to `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs`.

## Validation Evidence

- Static inspection of workflow persistence call sites (`src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs`, `prompt_review.rs`, `completion.rs`, `final_review.rs`) shows they already serialize `envelope.metadata.backend_used.family` and `envelope.metadata.model_used.model_id`, so removing the service overwrite makes persisted artifact metadata follow the adapter-reported values.
- `git diff -- src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs` shows the functional change is limited to removing the two overwrite lines and adding a regression test for divergent adapter metadata.
- `command -v cargo`, `command -v rustc`, and `command -v rustfmt` all returned no path, so executable validation could not be performed in this environment.

## Outstanding Risks

- Rust tooling is unavailable in this environment (`cargo`, `rustc`, and `rustfmt` were not installed), so I could not run `cargo test`, `cargo check`, or formatting; validation is limited to static inspection.
